untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle pattern requires multi-bar shape recognition (cup formation, handle retracement, and breakout confirmation) that cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern's core definition depends on sequential price structure analysis (measuring pattern height as % of breakout price, pattern length in days, width/height classification) which exceeds the scope of point-in-time indicator logic. Exit conditions are marked AUTHOR_SILENT, providing no clear exit rules. Recommend implementing as custom pattern recognition module or multi-bar state machine rather than indicator-based conditions.
